calendar.matters:
Petition Of Christopher Brooks Bias To Amend Irrevocable Trust Nunc Pro Tunc Based On Scrivener'S Error
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and Robert Begley for Christopher Bias.

Mr. Der presented oral argument to support his position. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court denied the Petition to Amend Irreveocable Trust Nunc Pro Tunc. Mr. Der is to prepare the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition Of Christopher Brooks Bias To Amend Irrevocable Trust Nunc Pro Tunc Based On Scrivener'S Error
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Continued To Aug-18-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
